removeTrailingCommas.description: Remove trailing commas from processed files.

minify.description: Minify output by removing all whitespace. When true, tabSize has no effect.

jsonc.description: Also process .jsonc files in addition to .json.

json5.description: Also process .json5 files in addition to .json.

batchSize.description: Number of files per worker batch. Only relevant when processing more than 500 files.

tabSize.description: Number of spaces used for indentation in the output. Has no effect when minify is true.
